title: 'Hungry' Watkins is man on mission but will Tuchel take notice?
summary: Ollie Watkins has responded to his England squad exclusion with exceptional performances, scoring twice against Bologna and once against West Ham. His resurgence raises questions about whether manager Thomas Tuchel will reconsider him for future international selection. Watkins' determination demonstrates a compelling case for his return to the England setup.
content: Ollie Watkins' response to being dropped by England has been nothing short of emphatic, with two strikes in Bologna adding to his goal against West Ham before the international break.

zh.title: "渴望"的沃特金斯是有使命的人，但图赫尔会注意到吗？
zh.summary: 奥利·沃特金斯以对博洛尼亚进两球、对韦斯特汉姆进一球的出色表现回应了国家队的除名。他的复兴引发了人们对主教练图赫尔是否会重新考虑他的疑问。沃特金斯的决心为他重返英格兰阵容提供了有力支持。

title: Estevao could be Brazil's World Cup's surprise - Davide Ancelotti
summary: Brazil assistant coach Davide Ancelotti has identified Chelsea's 18-year-old winger Estevao Willian as a potential surprise package for the 2026 World Cup. Ancelotti believes the young talent has the ability to make a significant impact at the tournament. His endorsement highlights Estevao's exceptional readiness despite his youth.
content: Brazil assistant coach Davide Ancelotti has tipped Chelsea's 18-year-old winger Estevao Willian to be the surprise package at the summer's World Cup.

zh.title: 埃斯特瓦奥可能成为巴西世界杯的惊喜——达维德·安切洛蒂
zh.summary: 巴西助理教练达维德·安切洛蒂已经将切尔西18岁边锋埃斯特瓦奥·威廉视为2026年世界杯的潜在黑马。安切洛蒂相信这位年轻天才有能力在赛事中产生重大影响。他的认可凸显了埃斯特瓦奥尽管年纪轻轻但表现出的非凡成熟度。

title: Rogers centre of transfer tug of war - Friday's gossip
summary: Morgan Rogers is expected to be the center of a significant transfer battle among multiple clubs this summer. Juventus is making progress in their pursuit of Liverpool goalkeeper Alisson Becker, while Liverpool's ownership retains confidence in manager Arne Slot. Multiple high-profile transfer storylines are developing across Europe.
content: Morgan Rogers likely to be centre of transfer tug of war this summer, Juventus gaining hope of signing Alisson Becker, Liverpool owners believe Arne Slot will still be head coach next season, plus more.

zh.title: 罗杰斯成为转会争夺战的焦点——周五花边新闻
zh.summary: 摩根·罗杰斯有望成为今年夏天多家俱乐部之间激烈转会争夺的中心。尤文图斯在追求利物浦门神阿利松·贝克尔方面取得进展，而利物浦的管理层对主帅阿尔内·斯洛特保持信心。多条高调转会新闻线索正在欧洲各地发展。

title: FA investigating non-league chief over alleged abusive email
summary: The Football Association is investigating Northern Premier League chairman Mark Harris for allegedly sending an abusive email to an FC United of Manchester fan. The investigation concerns potential conduct violations at the non-league level. The matter underscores ongoing disciplinary issues within English football's lower divisions.

title: Barcelona complain to Uefa about VAR in Atletico loss
summary: Barcelona has filed a complaint with UEFA regarding a "grave lack of VAR intervention" during their Champions League defeat to Atletico Madrid. The complaint centers on controversial moments the club believes warranted video review. Barcelona is seeking accountability for match officiating decisions.
content: Barcelona submit a complaint to Uefa over a "grave lack of VAR intervention" during their Champions League defeat by Atletico Madrid on Wednesday.

title: 'Legend' Robertson to leave Liverpool in summer
summary: Andy Robertson will leave Liverpool at the end of the season after nine years with the club, the Premier League announced. The Scottish left-back departs when his contract expires this summer.

summary: Liverpool and Real Madrid are negotiating a major midfield swap involving Eduardo Camavinga and Alexis Mac Allister exchanging clubs. Such a deal would represent a significant reshuffling of talent between two European powerhouses.
content: Real Madrid and Liverpool are working on deals for Eduardo Camavinga and Alexis Mac Allister to swap clubs. Transfer Talk has the latest.

zh.title: 转会传言：利物浦、皇马推进重大中场互换交易
zh.summary: 利物浦和皇马正在谈判一项重大中场互换，涉及爱德华多·卡马文加和阿莱克西斯·麦克·奥利斯特交换球队。这样的交易将代表两个欧洲豪门之间的人才重大重组。

title: VAR review: Cubarsi's sending off changed Barça-Atléti, Pubill penalty claim?
summary: A VAR review examines the controversial sending off of Barcelona's Cubarsi in the match against Atlético Madrid, which dramatically shifted the game's dynamics within two minutes. Questions remain about whether the referee's decision was correct, with potential missed penalty claims also under scrutiny.
content: In the span of two minutes, Barcelona-Atlético went from scoreless, 11 v 11, to the Catalans trailing and down a man. Did the ref make the right call?

zh.title: VAR审查：库巴尔西的红牌改变了巴塞罗那对马竞，普比尔点球申诉？
zh.summary: VAR审查审视了巴塞罗那的库巴尔西在对阵马竞比赛中的有争议的红牌判罚，该判罚在两分钟内戏剧性地改变了比赛动态。关于裁判决定是否正确以及潜在的被遗漏的点球申诉仍存疑问。

title: Back Haaland and Semenyo to shine at Chelsea - FPL team of the week
summary: Fantasy Premier League strategists recommend backing Erling Haaland and Antoine Semenyo in Chelsea's double gameweek, emphasizing established performers like Bruno Fernandes. The upcoming fixtures present opportunities for these players to accumulate points.
content: Put your faith in trusted FPL assets such as Bruno Fernandes and Antoine Semenyo this week, with a double gameweek on the horizon.

zh.title: 支持哈兰德和塞门约在切尔西表现出色 - FPL本周最佳阵容
zh.summary: 幻想超级联赛策略师建议在切尔西双周赛中看好埃林·哈兰德和安托万·塞门约，强调已有声誉的球员如布鲁诺·费尔南德斯。即将到来的比赛为这些球员积累积分提供了机会。

title: Who will survive Premiership relegation dogfight?
summary: Analysis examines which teams will avoid relegation in the competitive Scottish Premiership battle at the bottom of the table. The piece also explores the unusual possibility of fans winning a league title, highlighting the unpredictable nature of the league.
content: A closer look at the bottom of the Scottish Premiership and can fans win a league title?

zh.title: 谁能在超级联赛降级混战中生存下来？
zh.summary: 分析研究了哪些球队将在竞争激烈的苏格兰超级联赛积分榜底部的争夺战中避免降级。该评论还探讨了球迷赢得联赛冠军的不寻常可能性，突显了该联赛的不可预测性。

title: Rangers fear Naderi could miss rest of season - gossip
summary: Rangers face concerns that midfielder Naderi could be sidelined for the remainder of the season due to injury, while Celtic also monitor injury concerns and Hearts deal with transfer interest in their key players. These developments could significantly impact the Scottish football landscape down the stretch.
content: Rangers and Celtic sweat over injury scans, while Hearts are desperate to fend off interest for one of their key players.

zh.title: 流浪者队担心纳德里可能缺席本赛季余下比赛 - 传言
zh.summary: 流浪者队面临中场球员纳德里可能因伤病而在本赛季余下时间里缺阵的担忧，同时凯尔特人也在监控伤病情况，而哈茨正在处理关键球员的转会兴趣。这些发展可能会对苏格兰足球格局在冲刺阶段产生重大影响。

title: How fluid PSG exposed Slot's back-five tweak
summary: Arne Slot changed Liverpool's defensive formation for their Champions League quarter-final against PSG, but European champions Paris St-Germain exploited the tactical adjustment to dominate the encounter. The analysis examines how PSG's fluid play exposed weaknesses in Liverpool's back-five setup.
content: Arne Slot changed Liverpool's shape for their Champions League quarter-final first leg - but their tactics were still bested by European champions Paris St-Germain. Umir Irfan explains how.

zh.title: PSG的流畅打法如何戳穿Slot的后五卫防线调整
zh.summary: 阿尔内·斯洛特为与巴黎圣日耳曼的欧冠四分之一决赛改变了利物浦的防线阵容,但欧洲冠军巴黎圣日耳曼利用这一战术调整控制了比赛。分析探讨了巴黎圣日耳曼的流畅进攻如何揭露了利物浦后五卫防线的弱点。

title: Howe's future & likely sales - why Newcastle face key summer
summary: Newcastle's inconsistent season has created uncertainty about manager Eddie Howe's future and sparked questions over potential summer departures of key players. BBC Sport assesses the defining challenges facing the club as they navigate a critical transfer window.
content: Newcastle's inconsistent season leaves them facing a defining summer - with questions over Eddie Howe's future and sales of key players a possibility. BBC Sport assesses the situation.

zh.title: 豪的前景与可能的转会——纽卡斯尔为何面临关键夏季
zh.summary: 纽卡斯尔不稳定的赛季引发了对主教练埃迪·豪前景的不确定性,也引发了对关键球员可能在夏窗离队的疑问。BBC体育评估了这家俱乐部在应对关键转会期时面临的决定性挑战。

title: Wilson delighted with Fulham's 'amazing' progress
summary: Fulham forward Harry Wilson reflects on his strong individual performances and the positive working relationship with manager Marco Silva as the club continues its impressive development. Wilson expresses satisfaction with the club's overall trajectory and progress.
content: Fulham forward Harry Wilson talks about his impressive individual performances, his relationship with manager Marco Silva, and Fulham's progress.

zh.title: 威尔逊对富勒姆'惊人'的进步感到欣喜
zh.summary: 富勒姆前锋哈里·威尔逊回顾了自己出色的个人表现和与主教练马可·席尔瓦的良好工作关系,俱乐部继续实现令人印象深刻的发展。威尔逊对俱乐部的整体发展轨迹和进步表示满意。

title: Stick or sack? Slot's Liverpool future dominates UCL talking points
summary: Following Liverpool's 2-0 Champions League quarter-final defeat to PSG, ESPN's expert panel debates whether Wednesday's performance was Arne Slot's worst yet and discusses implications for his future at the club. The loss has intensified scrutiny on the manager's tactical direction.
content: Was Wednesday's 2-0 loss Liverpool's worst performance under Arne Slot? ESPN's Mark Ogden, Julien Laurens, Gab Marcotti and Sam Tighe weigh in on that and all the other moments that mattered from the UCL quarterfinal first legs.

zh.title: 续任还是下课？斯洛特的利物浦前景主导欧冠讨论
zh.summary: 在利物浦以0:2负于巴黎圣日耳曼的欧冠四分之一决赛首回合后，ESPN专家组讨论周三的表现是否是阿尔内·斯洛特最差的一次，并讨论了这对他在俱乐部未来的影响。这次失利加强了对主帅战术方向的审视。

title: PSG's wastefulness leaves door open, but this isn't Klopp's Liverpool any more
summary: Liverpool lost 2-0 to PSG in the Champions League first leg, with manager Arne Slot acknowledging his team were "ripped apart." The absence of Jurgen Klopp's trademark attacking style makes a second-leg comeback improbable despite Liverpool mathematically remaining alive.
content: Liverpool escaped with a 2-0 loss vs. PSG in the Champions League. But with Jurgen Klopp's "heavy metal" style nowhere to be seen, a second-leg comeback looks improbable.

zh.title: 巴黎圣日耳曼的浪费留下生机，但这不再是克洛普时代的利物浦
zh.summary: 利物浦在欧冠首轮0-2负于巴黎圣日耳曼，主教练阿尔内·斯洛特承认球队被"撕裂"。缺少尤尔根·克洛普标志性的进攻风格使次回合逆转变得困难，尽管利物浦在数学上仍有生存机会。

title: Champions League specialist Álvarez shows Barça what they're missing
summary: Julián Álvarez delivered an energetic, world-class performance for Atlético Madrid against Barcelona in the Champions League, showcasing exactly why the club rates him so highly and won't part with him cheaply.
content: An energetic display capped off by a piece of world-class magic; Wednesday's performance is exactly why Barça rate Julián Álvarez so highly, and the reason Atleti won't give up their talisman cheaply.

zh.title: 欧冠专家阿尔瓦雷斯向巴萨展示他们缺少什么
zh.summary: 胡利安·阿尔瓦雷斯为马德里竞技在欧冠对阵巴萨的比赛中表现出充满活力的世界级表现，展示了为什么俱乐部如此看重他，不会廉价出售他。
